name: sidebar
title: Sidebar
description: Resizable right panel that hosts any registered view — file browser, git log, terminal, and more.

name: event-log-viewer
title: Inspector
description: Live viewer for raw agent events — user prompts, tool calls, permissions, streaming output. Great for debugging ACP sessions.

name: left-sidebar
title: History
description: Left rail in the chat view listing your past prompts. Click any entry to jump back to that message.

name: recent-agents
title: Recent Chats
description: Cmd+P command palette to instantly switch between your recently-used chats — VSCode style.

name: claude-plans
title: Claude Plans
description: Render Claude Code's plan-mode "Ready to code?" permission request as a proper markdown card — plan via Streamdown, plan file path, allowed prompts — instead of a blob of escaped JSON.

name: file-manager
title: File Manager
description: Cmd+D opens a keyboard-driven file manager modal to change the agent's cwd. Fuzzy search, shell-style cd autocomplete (~/, ./, /abs), Tab to complete, Escape pops up a directory — Raycast style.
